title: Carpenter Ant Control in Franklin Square, NY | $350–$2,000
metaDescription: Professional carpenter ant control in Franklin Square, Long Island. Fast, effective treatments for homes & businesses. Licensed exterminators. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners know that carpenter ants can quickly cause structural damage to properties if left untreated. Our expert carpenter ant control services in Franklin Square provide thorough inspections, targeted treatments, and long-term prevention strategies tailored to Long Island homes. Whether you're dealing with an active infestation or want preventative protection, we deliver reliable solutions at competitive prices.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and surrounding Long Island communities for years with certified technicians who understand the unique pest pressures of Nassau County homes. We use safe, EPA-approved methods and back our carpenter ant treatments with satisfaction guarantees, ensuring your property stays protected year-round.
localContext: Franklin Square's mix of classic Cape Cods, split-levels, and newer construction homes—many with wooden decks, porches, and mature trees—creates ideal conditions for carpenter ant colonies. From properties near Rath Park to homes along Washington Street and Hempstead Turnpike, our local expertise ensures we identify and eliminate nesting sites specific to Franklin Square's residential landscape.

faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Franklin Square typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Franklin Square home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants—especially in spring. Franklin Square homes with moisture issues or wood-to-soil contact are particularly vulnerable and should be inspected promptly.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products specifically designed for residential use and apply them according to strict safety protocols. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with children and pets, and we provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed after treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a carpenter ant problem in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Franklin Square residents in most cases. Given that carpenter ants can cause progressive structural damage, we prioritize rapid response to protect your home and provide peace of mind as quickly as possible.
